query: duckduckgo-search-cli pre-flight health check anti-bot detection
expected_use: validate that the CLI's --probe flag returns exit 0 and emits a JSON health report. Inspect stdout for status, latency_ms, and has_set_cookie fields

query: rust anti-bot identity pool 12 identities cascade rotation
expected_use: validate the v0.6.4 adaptive anti-bot identity pool. Run with --seed 42 to get deterministic rotation. Inspect stdout JSON metadados.identidade_usada field for the family-platform-hex16 tag and metadados.nivel_cascata for the cascade level (0..=4)

query: duckduckgo CLI identity-profile chrome-linux pinned
expected_use: validate that --identity-profile chrome-linux pins the session to a specific identity from the 12-identity pool. Expect metadados.identidade_usada to match the chrome-linux tag with the deterministic seed 0x33333333cccc0003

query: rust async tokio runtime 2026 best practices
expected_use: validate the v0.6.5 per-host circuit breaker (WS-12) by issuing 5 queries to the same domain in a single batch. With --retries 2 --global-timeout 60, the wall time must stay under 60s even if one host fails. Inspect results for partial completion

query: cross compilation Rust Linux Windows target triple
expected_use: validate v0.6.5 cross-platform install (MP-26). The CLI is invoked once and exits 0 in under 2 seconds. This query itself does not test Windows compilation, but validates that the v0.6.5 binary is functional after fresh install

query: indicatif progress bar terminal visualization Rust
expected_use: validate the v0.6.5 indicatif ProgressBar (WS-25). Use --fetch-content to enable the progress bar. The stderr stream must contain the progress bar format [{elapsed}] {bar} {pos}/{len}. The stdout stream must contain only valid JSON, no progress bar leakage

query: windows rust sys 0.59 HANDLE type safety FFI
expected_use: validate v0.6.5 Windows HANDLE type-safety fix (MP-26). This query runs on the host platform. On Windows, the binary must be functional. On Linux/macOS, the query validates the JSON contract is unchanged from v0.6.4

query: best rust http client 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.0 deep-research subcommand. The CLI must fan out the input into 1..=12 sub-queries via 5 heuristic templates, aggregate via RRF (K=60), and emit a JSON envelope with metadados.sub_queries[], metadados.total_resultados_unicos, and metadados.tempo_total_ms. Inspect .metadados.sub_queries[].status field — all entries must be ok

query: tokio vs async-std 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.0 deep-research Markdown synthesis. With --synthesize --synth-format markdown --budget-tokens 1500 the output must contain .sintese as a Markdown string with H2 headers, numbered references, and a length bounded by ~6000 chars (1500 tokens × 4 chars heuristic). Inspect .metadados.sub_queries[] for at least 2 entries since the query is explicitly comparative

query: tokio runtime
expected_use: validate v0.7.0 manual sub-queries strategy via --sub-queries-file. The file at /tmp/qs-test.txt must contain 3 sub-queries (comments and blanks ignored). The CLI must accept --max-sub-queries 12, --aggregate dedupe-by-url, and emit exactly the parsed sub-queries. Test cancellation: --global-timeout 1 must trigger exit 4 with partial results

query: rust async runtimes 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.0 argument validation. --max-sub-queries 13 must exit 2 (out of 1..=12 range). --max-sub-queries 0 must exit 2. The error message must indicate the valid range

query: serde_json performance
expected_use: validate v0.7.0 plain-text synthesis. With --synth-format plain the .sintese field must be a flat string without Markdown markers (no H2, no numbered brackets). Inspect character density to confirm no markup leakage

query: tokio vs smol comparison
expected_use: validate v0.7.0 JSON synthesis. With --synth-format json the .sintese field must be a JSON object with .evidencias[] array. Each entry has titulo, url, score, and fontes[]. Score normalized in [0.0, 1.0]

query: webassembly rust 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.0 composite query detection. The query is multi-aspect (WASM + Rust + 2026) so --sub-query-strategy heuristic must produce at least 3 sub-queries via the aspect template

query: cargo workspace monorepo
expected_use: validate v0.7.0 score normalization. .resultados[].score must be normalized in [0.0, 1.0] with higher = better. Inspect that scores are descending in the array order. RRF K=60 means practical range is (0, 0.05] for real corpora

query: rust wreq BoringSSL Cloudflare fingerprint
expected_use: validate the v0.7.3 TLS stack switch from rustls to BoringSSL via wreq. The query that previously returned 0 results in v0.7.2 (GAP-WS-27) must now return 5 results with the v0.7.3 binary. Inspect .quantidade_resultados >= 5 and .metadados.tempo_execucao_ms for a wall time under 2000ms

query: duckduckgo search CLI CAPTCHA detection
expected_use: validate v0.7.3 --probe-deep flag. The CLI must run a real search and classify the response body. Expect .status to be either 'ok' or 'captcha'. Expect .cascata_motivo, .sugestao_mitigacao, .http_status, .latency_ms, .endpoint, and .url fields to be present. Probe must complete in under 5 seconds

query: rust http client 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.3 --no-warmup flag. With --no-warmup, the CLI must skip the GET https://duckduckgo.com/ warm-up and emit the search results directly. Expect the query to complete faster than the default (warm-up adds 200-400ms). Expect 5+ resultados

query: rust async runtime 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.3 --no-cookie-persistence flag. With --no-cookie-persistence, no cookies.json file must be created or modified. The session cookies are kept in memory only. Expect 5+ resultados and exit 0

query: rust web framework 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.3 --cookies-path override. Pass --cookies-path /tmp/ddg-test-cookies.json and verify the file is created at that exact path with Unix permissions 0o600. Expect 5+ resultados and exit 0

query: rust cargo build 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.3 --allow-lite-fallback flag. The flag enables automatic fallback from html to lite endpoint when CAPTCHA is detected or when the html endpoint returns zero results. Expect exit 0 with at least 1 result (lite endpoint usually returns results where html is blocked)

query: rust async 2026 best practices
expected_use: validate v0.7.3 --version reports 0.7.3 and the binary is the new wreq+BoringSSL build. Inspect stdout for the version string. Expected: 'duckduckgo-search-cli 0.7.3'

query: cloudflare anomaly modal botnet interstitial 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.8 GAP-WS-50 + WS-51 probe-deep uses 9-word PROBE_CALIBRATION_QUERY and recognizes the new anomaly-modal markers. Expect .status to be ok or captcha with .cascata_motivo populated when CAPTCHA is detected

query: rust http client 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.8 GAP-WS-53 verbose multi-occurrence. The CLI must accept -vv and -vvv without clap error. Stderr must contain debug-level tracing with -vv and trace-level with -vvv

query: rust cargo build 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.8 GAP-WS-57 --retries honored. Pass --retries 5 and inspect .metadados.retentativas == 5. The value must be clamped to [1, 10] so --retries 20 is clamped to 10

query: duckduckgo-search-cli version smoke 0.7.8
expected_use: validate v0.7.8 smoke. --version must report 0.7.8 and exit 0

query: duckduckgo-search-cli version smoke 0.7.10
expected_use: validate v0.7.10 smoke. --version must report 0.7.10 and exit 0

query: rust identity profile pinned user agent 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.10 GAP-WS-60 closing pino de identidade. --identity-profile chrome-linux must pin User-Agent to Linux Chrome/146. Inspect .metadados.identidade_usada matches chrome-linux-* tag

query: duckduckgo pre flight ghost block lite 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.10 P3 pre_flight_fired metadata. With --pre-flight on a ghost-block response, .metadados.pre_flight_disparado must be true in the envelope

query: deep research require results no fanout 2026
expected_use: validate v0.7.10 P4 deep-research --require-results. With 0 aggregated results and --require-results, exit code must be non-zero (silent-discard BC break per rules-rust-cli-stdin-stdout-silent-discard)

query: blocked query exit code 6 anti-bot causa_zero 2026
expected_use: validate v0.8.0 GAP-AUD-003. When the IP is blocked (Cloudflare HTTP 202 + anomaly-modal), the envelope should contain metadados.causa_zero == 'anti-bot' AND exit code should be 6 (SUSPECTED_BLOCK). If ambiente limpo, causa_zero == 'legitimo' and exit code 5.

query: BC opt-out DUCKDUCKGO_ZERO_CAUSE_STRICT=false restore exit 5
expected_use: validate v0.8.0 BC opt-out. With DUCKDUCKGO_ZERO_CAUSE_STRICT=false, even when causa_zero == 'anti-bot' or 'ghost-block', exit code should fall back to 5 (legacy behavior) so v0.7.x pipelines that branch on exit 5 keep working.

query: multi-query causa_zero_histogram BTreeMap deterministic order
expected_use: validate v0.8.0 multi-query aggregation. When running multiple queries that each produce different causa_zero, the JSON should include causa_zero_histogram with BTreeMap-sorted keys (alphabetical). Keys omitted when all queries return results.

query: sugestao_proxima_acao actionable next-step suggestion
expected_use: validate v0.8.0 actionable suggestion. When causa_zero != 'legitimo', the envelope should contain metadados.sugestao_proxima_acao pointing the operator to --pre-flight, --allow-lite-fallback, or reformulation. When causa_zero == 'legitimo', field should be absent (skip_serializing_if).

query: rust async runtime 2026 Chrome headed Xvfb test
expected_use: validate v0.8.5 Chrome-primary search. Chrome runs HEADED inside a private Xvfb virtual display. The .metadados.tentou_chrome field MUST be true and .metadados.usou_chrome MUST be true when Chrome succeeds. If Chrome or Xvfb is unavailable, falls back to wreq.

query: duckduckgo search CLI Chrome stealth bytes metadata
expected_use: validate v0.8.0 Chrome search populates bytes_brutos and bytes_descomprimidos metadata fields. Both must be > 0 when results are returned.

query: BC opt-out Chrome zero-cause strict false exit 5
expected_use: validate v0.8.0 BC opt-out with Chrome-primary. When DUCKDUCKGO_ZERO_CAUSE_STRICT=false, exit code falls back to 5 even when Chrome-primary is active and causa_zero is anti-bot. Ensures v0.7.x pipeline compatibility.
